title: Material Attributes
description: Defines the physical properties of materials, including friction coefficients, elasticity, damage modifiers, and sound effects.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference path, used for editor intelligent suggestions and validation

friction.description: Friction coefficient vector, format [x, y, z]. x is lateral friction coefficient, y is forward friction coefficient, z has no practical meaning.

slip_adaptation.description: Slip adaptation coefficient, used to adjust friction behavior during sliding.

slip_curve.description: Tire slip friction curve parameters for longitudinal slip ratio and lateral slip angle.

peak_slip_ratio.description: Slip ratio at the peak friction scale.

kinetic_scale.description: Friction scale in the high-slip kinetic region.

lateral.description: Lateral slip-angle curve parameters. All angle fields use degrees.

peak_angle_deg.description: Slip angle (degrees) at peak friction scale.

kinetic_angle_deg.description: Slip angle (degrees) where kinetic scale is reached.

base_scale.description: Friction scale at zero slip angle.

kinetic_scale.description: Friction scale in the high-angle kinetic region.

restitution.description: Restitution coefficient (elasticity), 0 for completely inelastic collision, 1 for completely elastic collision.

block_damage_factor.description: Block damage factor, 0 for unable to break blocks, 1 for full damage, adjust this coefficient to change block breaking capability.

rha.description: Material relative hardness armor (RHA) penetration resistance coefficient. 0.5 means 50% RHA penetration resistance at same thickness, 1.5 means 1.5 times RHA penetration resistance.

angle_effect.description: Whether equivalent armor thickness is affected by impact angle, if false, thickness calculation ignores impact angle.

impact_modifiers.description: Impact modifiers, convert received damage into impact values applied to connection points according to certain rules. Default empty list, applies same amount of impact as damage to connection points.

penetration_modifiers.description: Penetration modifiers, adjust penetration depth based on received damage. If damage doesn't include penetration data, uses damage value; otherwise uses penetration data. Default uses 0.5 times the damage as penetration when damage doesn't include penetration data.

damage_modifiers.description: Damage modifiers, convert received damage into damage values according to certain rules. If damage doesn't include damage data, uses damage value; otherwise uses damage data. Default ignores impact damage below 5, significantly reduces damage from slimes and similar per-frame damage sources.

un_penetrate_damage_factor.description: Damage factor when attack fails to fully penetrate armor, formula: attack_damage * (penetration / equivalent_armor) ^ un_penetrate_damage_factor, no damage when not fully penetrated if this is 0.0.

hit_un_pen.description: Sound event when hit box is hit but not penetrated.

hit_pen.description: Sound event when hit box is hit and penetrated.
